name: HydraLiquid – Hyaluronic Acid Hydrating Solution
shortDescription: Farmona Professional intensively hydrating solution with hyaluronic acid, 500 ml. Sodium hyaluronate, mineral water, berry extracts. Approx. 50 treatments.
description:
The Farmona Professional Hydra Technology Hydrating Solution is a strongly hydrating, skin-conditioning solution developed specifically for modern cleansing and skin renewal procedures.

The combination of sodium hyaluronate, mineral water, and strawberry, blackberry, and raspberry extracts very effectively supports the skin's water-binding capacity, soothes irritation, and aids the natural regeneration of the epidermis.

500 ml size, sufficient for approximately 50 treatments. For professional use only.

faq.question: How many treatments does a 500 ml bottle last?
faq.answer: A 500 ml bottle is sufficient for approximately 50 treatments, which means extremely economical usage.

faq.question: Which devices can this solution be used with?
faq.answer: The solution is a professional hydrating liquid designed for cavitation peeling, hydro-abrasion treatments, oxygen infusion, and oxygen scrubbing procedures. It can be used in any protocol where hydration is the goal.

faq.question: What skin type is the hyaluronic acid solution recommended for?
faq.answer: Primarily recommended for dehydrated, dry, and sensitive skin. Sodium hyaluronate intensively hydrates and binds water, mineral water remineralizes, berry extracts regenerate and soothe.

whatsIncluded: 1 pc Farmona Professional HydraLiquid hyaluronic acid hydrating solution (500 ml)
